name: Commercial Vehicle Group, Inc.
summary: Commercial Vehicle Group, Inc. (CVG) is a global provider of systems, assemblies, and components for commercial vehicle and electric vehicle markets. The company operates three segments: Global Seating (seats for MD/HD trucks, construction, agriculture), Global Electrical Systems (wire harness assemblies, cable systems), and Trim Systems and Components (plastic assemblies, mirrors, wipers). CVG manufactures in the US, Mexico, China, UK, Czech Republic, Ukraine, Morocco, Thailand, India, and Australia, serving OEMs and aftermarket customers in North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific.
